name: The Liminal Archive
blurb: 4,420+ atmospheric chambers in a vast dark archive with fog-of-war exploration, ambient audio, and hidden secrets
features: Hidden easter eggs and vault puzzles

landmark.description: A towering dark obelisk surrounded by floating golden glyphs and orbiting fog wisps, with a warm amber glow emanating from within — representing the archive's vast collection of knowledge chambers

stats.themes: archaeology, mythology, linguistics, philosophy, science, art, and 100+ more
